description_long: This object consists of a group of six wooden storage crates of varying sizes, stacked together in a loosely organized arrangement. The crates are constructed from planks with a ribbed texture, giving them a rugged, industrial appearance suitable for urban environments such as warehouses, alleys, or garages. Each crate features a dark brown wood grain finish with visible seams and edges, and several have red stenciled markings, including a 'fragile' symbol and text, adding to their utilitarian look. The boxes are closed, with no visible openings, handles, or locks, and their surfaces appear solid and sturdy. The overall grouping forms a compact, blocky structure with some crates stacked atop others and one smaller crate set apart. The crates' design suggests they are intended for storage or transport of goods and can be easily moved or stacked as needed.
description: A group of six ribbed wooden storage crates with red stenciled markings, stacked in a compact, utilitarian arrangement. The crates have a rugged, industrial look and are suitable for urban storage or transport.
description_view_0: Three large crates form the base, with two smaller crates stacked on top and one small crate set apart to the right; red stenciled markings are visible on the front faces.
description_view_1: The arrangement appears more compact, with the crates closely grouped and the red stenciled markings visible on the front and side panels.
description_view_2: The crates are viewed from the side, showing the ribbed wood texture and the alignment of the boxes; the red markings are still visible but less prominent.
description_view_3: The view shows the back and side of the largest crates, with fewer visible markings and a clearer view of the wood grain texture.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: red stenciled markings with fragile symbol and text
